title: SMH 深度研究报告 - AI 半导体链条的基准篮子
titleEn: SMH Deep Research Report - Benchmark Sleeve For The AI Semiconductor Chain
summary: VanEck 半导体 ETF，是 AI 半导体链条的 benchmark/control sleeve，而不是 coverage-map 单一链条节点。发行人页面 2026-07-02 显示 NAV $592.26、总资产 $68.82B、总费率 0.35%；2026-07-01 持仓 26 只，前十大包括 NVDA 18.41%、TSM 9.18%、AMD 5.57%、AMAT 5.49%、AVGO 5.49%、MU 5.39%、KLAC 5.10%、LRCX 4.97%、ASML 4.96%、INTC 4.92%。定位为 lite benchmark / neutral control sleeve，用来比较单公司报告是否只是半导体 beta。
summaryEn: VanEck semiconductor ETF used as the AI-semiconductor chain benchmark/control sleeve, not as a single coverage-map node. The issuer page showed NAV $592.26, total net assets $68.82B, and 0.35% total expense ratio as of July 2, 2026; July 1 holdings numbered 26, led by NVDA 18.41%, TSM 9.18%, AMD 5.57%, AMAT 5.49%, AVGO 5.49%, MU 5.39%, KLAC 5.10%, LRCX 4.97%, ASML 4.96%, and INTC 4.92%. Classified as a lite benchmark / neutral control sleeve for separating single-name thesis evidence from broad semis beta.
highlights: SMH 不进 coverage-map planned[]：它是 broad semiconductor beta / benchmark ETF，不是单一 chainLayer 节点
前十大集中在 NVDA、TSM、AMD、AMAT、AVGO、MU、KLAC、LRCX、ASML、INTC，用来校验单公司报告是否只是半导体 beta

title: ASML 深度研究报告 - EUV / High-NA 作为设备层公共约束
titleEn: ASML Deep Research Report - EUV / High-NA as the Equipment-Layer Common Constraint
summary: AI 基础设施 semicap-equipment 层的公共约束：ASML 验证 foundry / memory capex 是否真正穿过光刻、EUV、High-NA、长期协议和出口管制这道最硬瓶颈。Q1 2026 net sales EUR 8.767B、gross margin 53.0%、net income EUR 2.757B；FY2026 指引 net sales EUR 36-40B、gross margin 51-53%。Q4 2025 net bookings EUR 13.158B，其中 EUV EUR 7.4B，年末 backlog EUR 38.797B。当前 ADR $1,769.32（2026-07-02）、市值约 $681.9B，按 EUR/USD 1.1440 和 FY2026 sales 中点折算，约 15.6x EV/2026E sales。中性观察 / 中确信：垄断质量极高，但估值已经资本化持续 EUV/High-NA 稀缺和出口管制可控。
summaryEn: Common-constraint coverage for the AI-infrastructure semicap-equipment layer. ASML tests whether foundry and memory capex truly passes through lithography, EUV, High-NA, long-term agreements, and export controls. Q1 2026 net sales were EUR 8.767B, gross margin was 53.0%, and net income was EUR 2.757B; FY2026 guidance is EUR 36-40B net sales and 51-53% gross margin. Q4 2025 net bookings were EUR 13.158B, including EUR 7.4B EUV, and year-end backlog was EUR 38.797B. At $1,769.32 per ADR (2026-07-02), about $681.9B market cap, and EUR/USD 1.1440, ASML trades around 15.6x EV/2026E sales at the FY2026 sales midpoint. Neutral watch / medium conviction: monopoly quality is exceptional, but the valuation already capitalizes durable EUV/High-NA scarcity and manageable export controls.
highlights: P2 设备层公共约束：ASML 用 EUV/High-NA、backlog、installed-base service 和出口管制验证 AI capex 是否进入最硬工具瓶颈
Q1 2026 net sales EUR 8.767B、gross margin 53.0%、net income EUR 2.757B；FY2026 指引 EUR 36-40B net sales、51-53% gross margin
Q4 2025 net bookings EUR 13.158B，其中 EUV EUR 7.4B；2025 年末 backlog EUR 38.797B
当前 ADR $1,769.32、市值约 $681.9B，约 15.6x EV/2026E sales；质量极高但估值容错率低

stanceRationale.zh: 以 $1,769.32、约 15.6x EV/2026E sales 计，市场已经定价 EUV / High-NA 稀缺、FY2026 EUR 36-40B 收入和出口管制可控；30% 牛市 / 40% 基准 / 30% 熊市情景表显示 base case 接近隐含预期，偏斜均衡。
stanceRationale.en: At $1,769.32 and about 15.6x EV/2026E sales, the market already prices EUV / High-NA scarcity, FY2026 revenue of EUR 36-40B, and manageable export controls; the 30% bull / 40% base / 30% bear grid leaves the base case close to implied expectations, so skew is balanced.

upgrade.zh: 如果 Q2 2026 订单与客户产能评论显示 EUV / High-NA bookings 仍高于 FY2026 收入 run-rate，backlog 转收入按计划推进，且出口管制更新没有压缩中国服务或系统机会，同时估值倍数没有进一步扩张，则上调至 constructive。
upgrade.en: move to constructive if Q2 2026 orders and customer-capacity commentary show EUV / High-NA bookings staying above the FY2026 revenue run-rate, backlog conversion remains on plan, and export-control updates do not reduce the China service or systems opportunity while the valuation multiple does not expand further.

downgrade.zh: 如果 EUV / High-NA bookings 放缓、EUR 38.797B backlog 出现取消或延期风险、中国/出口管制限制系统或 installed-base service 可达市场，或毛利率跌破 FY2026 51-53% 指引，则下调至 cautious。
downgrade.en: move to cautious if EUV / High-NA bookings slow, the EUR 38.797B backlog shows cancellation or delay risk, China/export-control limits reduce system or installed-base service access, or gross margin slips below the FY2026 51-53% guide.

title: Applied Materials 深度研究报告 - AI 扩产的广谱半导体设备仪表盘
titleEn: Applied Materials Deep Research Report - Broad Semicap Dashboard For AI Capacity Buildout
summary: AI 基础设施 semicap-equipment 层的广谱设备仪表盘：AMAT 验证 AI 需求是否不只卡在 EUV，而是扩散到 deposition、etch、advanced packaging、DRAM 和服务。FY2026 Q2 收入 $7.91B、GAAP gross margin 49.9%、non-GAAP EPS $2.86；Semiconductor Systems 收入 $5.965B，其中 foundry/logic/other 67%、DRAM 29%。Q3 指引收入 $8.950B +/- $500M、non-GAAP EPS $3.36 +/- $0.20。当前 $603.04、市值约 $478.8B、EV 约 $477.8B，约 13.3x EV/Q3 annualized sales、约 36.8x forward EPS。谨慎 / 中确信：上行周期强，但中国/台湾暴露和估值容错率让情景偏斜略偏负。
summaryEn: Broad equipment dashboard for the AI-infrastructure semicap-equipment layer. AMAT tests whether AI demand is spreading beyond EUV into deposition, etch, advanced packaging, DRAM, and services. Q2 FY2026 revenue was $7.91B, GAAP gross margin was 49.9%, and non-GAAP EPS was $2.86; Semiconductor Systems revenue was $5.965B, with foundry/logic/other at 67% and DRAM at 29%. Q3 guidance is $8.950B revenue +/- $500M and non-GAAP EPS of $3.36 +/- $0.20. At $603.04, about $478.8B market cap and $477.8B EV, AMAT trades around 13.3x EV/Q3 annualized sales and 36.8x forward EPS. Cautious / medium conviction: the upcycle is strong, but China/Taiwan exposure and valuation tolerance leave the scenario skew mildly negative.
highlights: 补齐广谱设备仪表盘：AMAT 验证 AI capex 是否进入 deposition、etch、advanced packaging、DRAM 和服务
FY2026 Q2 revenue $7.91B、Semiconductor Systems $5.965B，foundry/logic/other 67%、DRAM 29%
Q3 指引 revenue $8.950B +/- $500M、non-GAAP EPS $3.36 +/- $0.20
当前 $603.04、EV 约 $477.8B，约 13.3x Q3 annualized sales；中国/台湾暴露需要持续监控

stanceRationale.zh: 以 $603.04、约 13.3x EV/Q3 annualized sales 和约 36.8x forward EPS 计，市场已经定价广谱 WFE 上行周期；20% 牛市 / 50% 基准 / 30% 熊市情景表给出的加权判断略低于这一内嵌预期。
stanceRationale.en: At $603.04, about 13.3x EV/Q3 annualized sales and roughly 36.8x forward EPS, the market already prices a broad WFE upcycle; the 20% bull / 50% base / 30% bear grid leaves the weighted view slightly below that embedded expectation.

upgrade.zh: 如果 FY2026 Q3 收入达到或高于 $8.95B 中点、Semiconductor Systems operating margin 维持 35% 以上，foundry/logic 与 DRAM mix 同时强劲，且中国/台湾暴露没有受到出口管制或客户节奏冲击，同时 EV/sales 倍数没有进一步扩张，则上调至 neutral-watch 或 constructive。
upgrade.en: move to neutral-watch or constructive if FY2026 Q3 revenue reaches or exceeds the $8.95B midpoint, Semiconductor Systems operating margin stays above 35%, foundry/logic and DRAM mix remain strong together, and China/Taiwan exposure is not hit by export controls or customer timing while the EV/sales multiple does not expand further.

downgrade.zh: 如果 Q3 收入低于中点、Semiconductor Systems 增长或 operating margin 走弱、中国/台湾收入受到出口管制或客户节奏冲击，或库存与供应链扩建转化为去库存压力，则下调至 bearish-avoid。
downgrade.en: move to bearish-avoid if Q3 revenue misses the midpoint, Semiconductor Systems growth or operating margin weakens, China/Taiwan revenue is hit by export controls or customer timing, or the inventory and supply-chain build turns into destocking pressure.

title: Lam Research 深度研究报告 - AI 内存与先进逻辑的刻蚀/沉积校验
titleEn: Lam Research Deep Research Report - Etch And Deposition Check On AI Memory And Advanced Logic
summary: AI 基础设施 semicap-equipment 层的刻蚀/沉积仪表盘：LRCX 验证 HBM、先进 DRAM、3D 结构和领先逻辑是否提高 process-tool intensity。2026 年 3 月季度收入 $5.841B、GAAP gross margin 49.8%、non-GAAP EPS $1.47；Systems revenue $3.731B，customer-support-related and other revenue $2.111B。6 月季度指引收入 $6.60B +/- $400M、gross margin 50.5%、operating margin 36.5%。当前 $351.41、市值约 $439.5B、EV 约 $438.4B，约 16.6x EV/June-quarter annualized sales。中性观察 / 中确信：AI process intensity 强，但中国 34% 收入暴露和估值让偏斜保持均衡。
summaryEn: Etch/deposition dashboard for the AI-infrastructure semicap-equipment layer. LRCX tests whether HBM, advanced DRAM, 3D structures, and leading-edge logic are raising process-tool intensity. March 2026 quarter revenue was $5.841B, GAAP gross margin was 49.8%, and non-GAAP EPS was $1.47; Systems revenue was $3.731B and customer-support-related and other revenue was $2.111B. June-quarter guidance is $6.60B revenue +/- $400M, 50.5% gross margin, and 36.5% operating margin. At $351.41, about $439.5B market cap and $438.4B EV, LRCX trades around 16.6x EV/June-quarter annualized sales. Neutral watch / medium conviction: AI process intensity is strong, but China exposure at 34% of revenue and valuation keep the skew balanced.
highlights: 补齐刻蚀/沉积仪表盘：LRCX 验证 AI 内存与先进逻辑是否提高 process-tool intensity
2026 年 3 月季度 revenue $5.841B、non-GAAP EPS $1.47；Systems revenue $3.731B
6 月季度指引 revenue $6.60B +/- $400M、operating margin 36.5%
当前 $351.41、EV 约 $438.4B，约 16.6x June-quarter annualized sales；China 34% 是核心风险

stanceRationale.zh: 以 $351.41、约 16.6x EV/June-quarter annualized sales 计，市场已经在为较高 process-tool intensity 付费；30% 牛市 / 40% 基准 / 30% 熊市情景表让 base case 接近这一隐含预期，偏斜均衡。
stanceRationale.en: At $351.41 and about 16.6x EV/June-quarter annualized sales, the market is already paying for elevated process-tool intensity; the 30% bull / 40% base / 30% bear grid leaves the base case close to that implied expectation, so skew is balanced.

upgrade.zh: 如果 6 月季度收入达到或高于 $6.60B 中点、Systems revenue 持续扩张且 operating margin 接近 36.5%，China/Korea/Taiwan mix 没有出口管制或客户节奏断点，且服务收入保持韧性、估值倍数没有进一步扩张，则上调至 constructive。
upgrade.en: move to constructive if June-quarter revenue reaches or exceeds the $6.60B midpoint, Systems revenue keeps expanding with operating margin near 36.5%, China/Korea/Taiwan mix shows no export-control or customer-timing break, and service revenue remains resilient without further multiple expansion.

downgrade.zh: 如果 Systems revenue 或服务收入走弱、中国收入或出口限制降低出货可见度、日本 deferred-revenue 验收延后，或 operating margin 低于 36.5% 指引而股价仍处于十几倍 EV/sales 框架，则下调至 cautious。
downgrade.en: move to cautious if Systems revenue or service revenue weakens, China revenue or export limits reduce shipment visibility, Japan deferred-revenue acceptance slips, or operating margin misses the 36.5% guide while the stock still trades at a mid-teens EV/sales frame.

title: KLA 深度研究报告 - AI 产能的过程控制与良率仪表盘
titleEn: KLA Deep Research Report - Process-Control And Yield Dashboard For AI Capacity
summary: AI 基础设施 semicap-equipment 层的过程控制/良率仪表盘：KLAC 验证 AI 扩产是否不只是装机，而是投入 inspection、metrology 和 process-control 来形成可制造良率。FY2026 Q3 revenue $3.416B、GAAP EPS $9.12、non-GAAP EPS $9.40（公司 as-reported 口径）；Semiconductor Process Control revenue $3.084B。季度 operating cash flow $707.5M、FCF $622.3M；LTM FCF $4.01B。当前 $235.55、市值约 $307.7B、EV 约 $308.9B；因当前市场数据与披露 EPS 疑似拆股基准不同，估值以约 22.6x EV/Q3 annualized revenue 和约 1.3% LTM FCF yield 观察。谨慎 / 中确信：质量极高，但倍数对任何 WFE 或 process-control 降温都很敏感。
summaryEn: Process-control and yield dashboard for the AI-infrastructure semicap-equipment layer. KLAC tests whether AI capacity is not just installed, but supported by inspection, metrology, and process control that make advanced capacity yieldable. FY2026 Q3 revenue was $3.416B, GAAP EPS was $9.12, and non-GAAP EPS was $9.40 on the company's as-reported basis; Semiconductor Process Control revenue was $3.084B. Quarterly operating cash flow was $707.5M and FCF was $622.3M; LTM FCF was $4.01B. At $235.55, about $307.7B market cap and $308.9B EV, valuation is best viewed through about 22.6x EV/Q3 annualized revenue and about 1.3% LTM FCF yield because current market data and filing EPS appear to use different split bases. Cautious / medium conviction: quality is exceptional, but the multiple is highly sensitive to any WFE or process-control cooling.
highlights: 补齐过程控制/良率仪表盘：KLAC 验证 AI 扩产是否能变成可制造产能
FY2026 Q3 revenue $3.416B，Semiconductor Process Control revenue $3.084B
季度 FCF $622.3M，LTM FCF $4.01B；新增 $7B 回购授权
当前 $235.55、EV 约 $308.9B，约 22.6x Q3 annualized revenue；质量高但倍数敏感

stanceRationale.zh: 以 $235.55、约 22.6x EV/Q3 annualized revenue 和约 1.3% LTM FCF yield 计，市场已经在为稀缺 process-control 复合增长付费；20% 牛市 / 40% 基准 / 40% 熊市情景表给出的加权判断低于这一内嵌预期。
stanceRationale.en: At $235.55, roughly 22.6x EV/Q3 annualized revenue and about 1.3% LTM FCF yield, the market is already paying for scarce process-control compounding; the 20% bull / 40% base / 40% bear grid leaves the weighted view below that embedded expectation.

upgrade.zh: 如果 process-control revenue 持续增长，foundry/logic、memory、advanced packaging 和 services 的 AI 增长向量仍然广泛，LTM FCF yield 在没有周期转弱信号的情况下改善，且 EV/sales 框架通过基本面而不是股价下跌收缩，则上调至 neutral-watch。
upgrade.en: move to neutral-watch if process-control revenue keeps growing, AI growth vectors across foundry/logic, memory, advanced packaging, and services remain broad, LTM FCF yield improves without a weaker cycle signal, and the EV/sales frame contracts without price-driven downside.

downgrade.zh: 如果 WFE 或 process-control demand 降温、Specialty Semiconductor Process 或 PCB / Component Inspection 开始拖累核心增长、FCF 不再支撑 buyback/dividend，或估值仍高于 20x annualized revenue 而指引转弱，则下调至 bearish-avoid。
downgrade.en: move to bearish-avoid if WFE or process-control demand cools, Specialty Semiconductor Process or PCB / Component Inspection starts dragging core growth, FCF no longer supports buybacks/dividends, or valuation remains above 20x annualized revenue while guidance weakens.

title: Synopsys 深度研究报告 - AI 芯片设计的 EDA/IP 与仿真约束
titleEn: Synopsys Deep Research Report - EDA/IP And Simulation Constraint For AI Silicon Design
summary: AI 基础设施 eda-ip 层的公共约束：SNPS 验证 AI silicon 需求是否穿透到 design automation、verification、simulation、IP blocks 和 system-level complexity。FY2026 Q2 revenue $2.276B（去年同期 $1.604B）、GAAP EPS $0.09、non-GAAP EPS $3.35；FY2026 指引 revenue $9.625-9.705B、non-GAAP EPS $14.72-14.80、FCF 约 $2.0B。指引包含约 $2.96B Ansys revenue，并假设没有进一步 export-control / Entity List 变化。当前 $437.16、市值约 $83.7B、EV 约 $92.1B，约 9.5x EV/FY2026E sales、约 29.6x non-GAAP P/E。偏多 / 中确信：AI EDA/IP durability 与 Ansys 仿真资产让基准情景略高于市场隐含要求，但整合、出口和客户周期性仍限制确信度。
summaryEn: Common-constraint coverage for the AI-infrastructure eda-ip layer. SNPS tests whether AI silicon demand is flowing into design automation, verification, simulation, IP blocks, and system-level complexity. Q2 FY2026 revenue was $2.276B versus $1.604B a year ago, GAAP EPS was $0.09, and non-GAAP EPS was $3.35; FY2026 guidance is $9.625-9.705B revenue, $14.72-14.80 non-GAAP EPS, and about $2.0B FCF. Guidance includes about $2.96B of Ansys revenue and assumes no further export-control / Entity List changes. At $437.16, about $83.7B market cap and $92.1B EV, SNPS trades around 9.5x EV/FY2026E sales and 29.6x non-GAAP P/E. Constructive / medium conviction: AI EDA/IP durability and the Ansys simulation asset put the base case slightly above what the market embeds, but integration, export, and customer-cycle risks keep conviction capped.
highlights: 补齐 EDA/IP 公共约束：SNPS 验证 AI design starts 与复杂度是否进入 design automation、verification、simulation 和 IP

当前 $437.16、EV 约 $92.1B，约 9.5x FY2026E sales、约 29.6x non-GAAP P/E；v5 偏多 / 中确信

stanceRationale.zh: 以 $437.16、约 9.5x EV/FY2026E sales 和约 29.6x non-GAAP P/E 计，市场已经要求 AI EDA/IP durability、Ansys 并表和 FCF 修复，但我们的基准情景认为 simulation pull-through、Design IP 和 verification 复杂度仍略高于这个隐含要求。
stanceRationale.en: At $437.16, roughly 9.5x EV/FY2026E sales, and about 29.6x non-GAAP P/E, the market already requires AI EDA/IP durability, Ansys consolidation, and FCF repair, but our base case sees simulation pull-through, Design IP, and verification complexity running slightly ahead of that embedded requirement.

downgrade.zh: 若 Ansys 整合稀释执行、Design IP 或 Design Automation 增长低于 AI 复杂度叙事、FCF 低于约 $2.0B 指引，或新增 export-control / Entity List 变化破坏 FY2026 指引，则下调至 neutral-watch 或 cautious。

title: NRG Energy 深度研究报告 - AI 电力需求是否穿透到 merchant gas 与零售电力
titleEn: NRG Energy Deep Research Report - Does AI Power Demand Reach Merchant Gas and Retail Power?
summary: AI 基础设施 power 层的 merchant + retail dashboard：NRG 不是核电 PPA 纯标的，而是用 LS Power 后约 25GW 发电平台、CPower 约 6GW C&I VPP、Texas/PJM capacity 与 Reliant/Vivint 零售/家庭服务来验证数据中心电力需求是否扩散到普通 merchant capacity。2026Q1 收入 $10.26B、GAAP 净利润 $125M、调整后 EBITDA $1.08B、FCFbG -$66M；2026 指引调整后 EBITDA $5.325-5.825B、调整后 EPS $7.90-9.90、FCFbG $2.8-3.3B。LS Power 交易约 $12.0B enterprise value、18 座燃气电厂、约 13GW、CPower 约 6GW 和 2,000+ C&I 客户，已经反映在 2026 业绩口径中。当前 $136.70（2026-07-02 收盘）、市值约 $28.8B、EV 约 $52.7B，约 15.4x 2026 调整后 EPS 指引中点、约 9.4x 2026 调整后 EBITDA 指引中点。高风险观察：NRG 披露的是数据中心/large-load optionality，尚不是具名 hyperscaler PPA，核心监控是合同转化、ERCOT/PJM 容量价格、零售/Vivint margin 与去杠杆。
highlights: 补齐 power 层 merchant + retail dashboard：NRG 验证 AI/data-center 电力需求是否从核电 PPA 扩散到燃气容量、C&I VPP、ERCOT/PJM 容量市场和零售电力
LS Power 交易约 $12.0B enterprise value，增加 18 座燃气电厂、约 13GW，并带入 CPower 约 6GW C&I VPP 平台和 2,000+ C&I 客户；总发电容量扩大到约 25GW
2026Q1 收入 $10.26B、GAAP 净利润 $125M、调整后 EBITDA $1.08B、FCFbG -$66M；2026 指引调整后 EBITDA $5.325-5.825B、调整后 EPS $7.90-9.90、FCFbG $2.8-3.3B
当前 $136.70（2026-07-02）、市值约 $28.8B、EV 约 $52.7B；约 15.4x 2026 调整后 EPS 指引中点、约 9.4x 2026 调整后 EBITDA 指引中点；尚未披露具名 hyperscaler PPA，合同转化和去杠杆是关键
summaryEn: Merchant plus retail power dashboard for the AI-infrastructure power layer. NRG is not a pure nuclear-PPA name; it tests whether data-center power demand spreads into ordinary merchant capacity through the post-LS-Power roughly 25GW generation platform, CPower's roughly 6GW C&I VPP, Texas/PJM capacity markets, and Reliant/Vivint retail/home-services economics. Q1 2026 revenue was $10.26B, GAAP net income was $125M, adjusted EBITDA was $1.08B, and FCFbG was -$66M; 2026 guidance is adjusted EBITDA $5.325-5.825B, adjusted EPS $7.90-9.90, and FCFbG $2.8-3.3B. The LS Power deal was framed at about $12.0B enterprise value, 18 gas plants, about 13GW, CPower about 6GW and 2,000+ C&I customers, and is now reflected in 2026 results. At $136.70 (2026-07-02 close), about $28.8B market cap and about $52.7B EV, NRG trades around 15.4x the midpoint of 2026 adjusted EPS guidance and about 9.4x the midpoint of 2026 adjusted EBITDA guidance. High-risk watch: NRG has disclosed data-center / large-load optionality, not a named hyperscaler PPA; the key monitors are contract conversion, ERCOT/PJM capacity pricing, retail/Vivint margin and deleveraging.

title: Equinix 深度研究报告 - AI 数据中心设施层的互联溢价仪表盘
titleEn: Equinix Deep Research Report - The Interconnection-Premium Dashboard for AI Data-Center Facilities
summary: AI 基础设施 datacenter-facility 层的 DLR 对照组：EQIX 用 Platform Equinix interconnection、retail colocation、xScale JV 和 AFFO/share 来验证 AI 需求是否不只是 hyperscale shell leasing。2026Q1 收入 $2.444B（reported YoY +10%）、营业利润 $577M、净利润 $415M、调整后 EBITDA $1.245B、AFFO/share $10.79；MRR 同比 +12% reported / +10% normalized constant currency，annualized gross bookings $378M，annualized presales 约 $140M，largest deals 约 60% AI-related。2025 年报披露 280 个数据中心、10,500+ 客户、507,000+ interconnections，Q1 2026 interconnection revenue $446M。当前 $1,002.02（2026-07-02）、市值约 $98.8B、EV 约 $120.8B，约 23.5x 2026 AFFO/share 指引中点、约 11.9x 2026 revenue 指引。中性观察：质量高但估值高，关键监控是 interconnection revenue、AI bookings/presales、xScale economics、MRR/cabinet yield 与 power availability。
highlights: 补齐 datacenter-facility 层 DLR 对照组：EQIX 验证 AI 需求是否穿透到 interconnection、retail colocation、xScale JV 和 AFFO/share，而不只是 hyperscale leasing

title: Nebius Group 深度研究报告 - neocloud 的『干净对照组』：对 CoreWeave 风险锚的架构校验
titleEn: Nebius Group Deep Research Report - The 'Clean' Neocloud: An Architecture Check on the CoreWeave Risk Anchor
summary: 本中心 AI 基础设施书 demand-risk 层的第二篇，作为对 CoreWeave 风险锚的『交叉校验/架构校验』。前身 Yandex 的国际继承者、阿姆斯特丹总部、纳斯达克上市的全栈 AI 云（neocloud）。与 CoreWeave 相反：Q1 2026 营收 $3.99 亿(+684%)、AI 云 ARR $19.2 亿、调整后 EBITDA 转正 $1.295 亿、经营现金流 +$22.6 亿，靠约 $93 亿现金/客户预付款/可转债、而非 GPU 抵押杠杆融资；约 $84 亿非流动债务与约 $10 亿经营租赁负债，对照约 $93 亿现金，金融债务口径近中性、租赁调整后中性至约 $40 亿净现金（取决于预付认股权证处理）。但 GAAP 净利 $6.21 亿实为一笔 $7.806 亿 ClickHouse 非现金重估（经营层面 −$1.28 亿亏损），且正积累与 CoreWeave 同款的超大规模集中（微软最高约 $194 亿 + Meta 最高约 $270 亿，合计约 $460 亿公司披露承诺/上限）与 NVIDIA 供应商+股东循环性。股价约 $240（2026-07-01，6 月 22 日纳指 100 纳入前后约 $256）、市值约 $610 亿、约 2.539 亿流通股，约 17-19x EV/2026E 营收（约 CoreWeave 的 3 倍）、约 7x EV/退出 ARR；2026 资本开支 $200-250 亿(约 7 倍营收)。核心读数：CoreWeave 的脆弱只是资产负债表选择，还是 neocloud 模式的固有属性？答案——只有偿付脆弱是 CoreWeave 独有，需求/集中/循环/资本开支风险是全层共享。高质量但高预期/高风险（观察）。
highlights: demand-risk 层第二篇，作为 CoreWeave 风险锚的『架构校验』对照组：一朵用现金/预付款/可转债、而非 GPU 抵押债融资的 neocloud——检验 CoreWeave 的脆弱是模式性的还是资产负债表性的
与 CoreWeave 相反的报表：Q1 2026 营收 $3.99 亿(+684%)、AI 云 ARR $19.2 亿、调整后 EBITDA 转正 $1.295 亿(集团 32%/云 45%)、经营现金流 +$22.6 亿；约 $93 亿现金 vs 约 $84 亿非流动债务 + 约 $10 亿经营租赁负债，金融债务口径近中性、租赁调整后仍显著更轻
但两条警报：GAAP 净利 $6.21 亿实为 $7.806 亿 ClickHouse 非现金重估(经营层面仍 −$1.28 亿亏损)；集中度与循环性在向 CoreWeave 收敛(微软最高约 $194 亿 + Meta 最高约 $270 亿，公司披露承诺/上限；NVIDIA 供应商+$20 亿股东)
股价约 $240(2026-07-01；6 月 22 日纳指 100 纳入前后约 $256)、市值约 $610 亿、约 2.539 亿流通股；约 17-19x EV/2026E 营收(约 CoreWeave 3 倍)、约 7x EV/退出 ARR；2026 资本开支 $200-250 亿(约 7 倍营收)。高质量但高预期/高风险(观察)
summaryEn: The second report in this center's AI-infra demand-risk layer, serving as the cross-check ('architecture check') on the CoreWeave risk anchor. Nebius is the Amsterdam-HQ, NASDAQ-listed, full-stack AI-cloud (neocloud) successor to the former Yandex. It is CoreWeave's mirror image: Q1 2026 revenue $399.0M (+684%), AI-cloud ARR $1.92B, adjusted EBITDA turned positive at $129.5M, and +$2.3B operating cash flow — funded by ~$9.3B cash, customer prepayments and convertibles rather than GPU-collateralized leverage, with ~$8.4B non-current debt plus ~$1.0B operating lease liabilities against ~$9.3B cash (financial-debt near-neutral; lease-adjusted neutral to ~$4B net cash depending on prefunded-warrant treatment). But GAAP net income of $621M is a $780.6M non-cash ClickHouse revaluation over a −$128M operating loss, and Nebius is accumulating the same hyperscaler concentration (Microsoft up to ~$19.4B + Meta up to ~$27B, ~$46B company-disclosed commitments/ceilings) and the same NVIDIA supplier-shareholder circularity as CoreWeave. Stock ~$240 (2026-07-01; ~$256 around its June-22 Nasdaq-100 inclusion), market cap ~$61B on ~253.9M shares outstanding, ~17-19x EV/2026E revenue (~3x CoreWeave's) and ~7x EV/exit-ARR; 2026 capex $20-25B (~7x revenue). Core read-through: is CoreWeave's fragility a balance-sheet choice or inherent to the neocloud model? Only the solvency fragility is CoreWeave-specific; the demand/concentration/circularity/capex risks are shared across the layer. High-quality-but-high-expectations / high-risk (watch).

title: Arista Networks 深度研究报告 - AI 集群开放以太网 fabric 的系统软件卖铲人
titleEn: Arista Networks Deep Research Report - The Open Ethernet Fabric of AI Clusters
summary: AI 集群网络层首次覆盖：Arista 是开放以太网/AI spine/scale-out 网络的系统软件卖铲人，正面回答 NVIDIA Spectrum-X/InfiniBand/NVLink 一体化 vs Broadcom merchant silicon + Arista EOS/CloudVision/800G Ethernet 生态的路线之争。Q1 2026 营收 $2.709B(+35.1%)、GAAP/非GAAP营业利润率 42.7%/47.8%、非GAAP EPS $0.87、经营现金流 $1.69B；Q2 指引营收约 $2.8B。FY2025 Cloud and AI Titans/AI Specialty Providers 占收入 48%/20%，Core AI/Cloud/Data Center Networking 占 65%。但两大匿名终端客户合计约 42% 收入(26%/16%)、高度依赖 Broadcom merchant silicon，且 Jun 29 2026 市值约 $206.6B、约 56x TTM GAAP P/E、约 47x 当前非GAAP EPS运行率。neutral-watch / 中等确信：高质量，但大多已定价。
highlights: AI 集群网络层补位：ANET 不是光模块/光纤层，而是开放以太网交换系统、EOS、CloudVision、遥测与 AI fabric 控制点；可交叉校验 NVDA/AVGO/AAOI/GLW/VRT/CRWV
Q1 2026 营收 $2.709B(+35.1%)、非GAAP营业利润率 47.8%、非GAAP EPS $0.87、经营现金流 $1.69B；现金+可交易证券约 $12.35B、基本无债，Q2 指引收入约 $2.8B
路线之争：NVIDIA 一体化网络栈(Spectrum-X/InfiniBand/NVLink) vs Broadcom merchant silicon + Arista EOS/CloudVision/800G Ethernet；ANET 更像 Broadcom 生态客户/伙伴，而非直接替代
neutral-watch / 中等确信：价格约 $164.10、约 20x EV/TTM 收入，市场已要求多年高 20% 至 30% 中段增长与优秀利润率，等待更好价格或更强开放以太网份额证据
summaryEn: Initial coverage of the AI cluster networking layer: Arista is the open Ethernet / AI spine / scale-out systems-software pick-and-shovel, directly testing NVIDIA Spectrum-X/InfiniBand/NVLink integration vs Broadcom merchant silicon + Arista EOS/CloudVision/800G Ethernet. Q1 2026 revenue was $2.709B (+35.1%), GAAP/non-GAAP operating margin 42.7%/47.8%, non-GAAP EPS $0.87, and operating cash flow $1.69B; Q2 guide is about $2.8B revenue. FY2025 Cloud and AI Titans / AI Specialty Providers were 48%/20% of revenue, and Core AI/Cloud/Data Center Networking was 65%. But two anonymous end customers were ~42% of revenue (26%/16%), Arista is highly reliant on Broadcom merchant silicon, and at the Jun 29 2026 market cap of ~$206.6B the stock trades around 56x TTM GAAP earnings and ~47x current non-GAAP EPS run-rate. Neutral-watch / medium conviction: high quality, but mostly priced in.

title: CoreWeave 深度研究报告 - AI 建设的风险锚：真实需求还是杠杆与循环融资？
titleEn: CoreWeave Deep Research Report - The AI Buildout's Risk Anchor: Real Demand or Leverage & Circular Financing?
summary: 本中心 AI 基础设施书的『风险锚』，刻意以熊市为主轴写。GPU『neocloud』，一边是 $994 亿公司定义收入 backlog（RPO + 其他承诺客户合同金额）与 56% 调整后 EBITDA，一边是扩大的 GAAP 净亏损（Q1 2026 −$7.4 亿）、约 $249 亿债务、约 $100 亿经营租赁负债、$310-350 亿 2026 资本开支（约 3 倍营收）。客户集中（微软历史上收入占比 >60%；CNBC 引 2024 年为 62%），NVIDIA 同时是供应商+股东（$20 亿@$87）+$63 亿产能兜底（循环性）。Q1 2026 营收 $20.78 亿(+112%)，FY2026 指引营收 $120-130 亿。股价已较 2025 峰值回落约 47% 至约 $96、市值约 $520 亿、经营租赁前金融净债务约 $229 亿、含经营租赁净义务栈约 $329 亿。中心问题：是真实经济需求还是被杠杆催起的提前囤货？高风险/偏熊（回避-观察）。
highlights: 本中心 AI 基础设施书的『风险锚』，以熊市为主轴：检验 AI 建设是真实经济需求、还是被杠杆与循环融资吹起的提前囤货——四条 kill-criterion 的读数回传整本书
矛盾核心：$994 亿公司定义收入 backlog + 56% 调整后 EBITDA vs 扩大的 GAAP 净亏损(Q1'26 −$7.4 亿)、约 $249 亿债务、约 $100 亿经营租赁负债、$310-350 亿 2026 资本开支(约 3 倍营收)；GPU 6 年折旧寿命有争议
循环性：微软历史上收入占比 >60%；NVIDIA 是供应商+股东($20 亿@$87)+$63 亿产能兜底(最后买家至 2032)；微软自建(MAI)、OpenAI 分散、Core Scientific 收购被否
股价已较 2025 峰值回落约 47% 至约 $96、市值约 $520 亿、经营租赁前金融净债务约 $229 亿、含经营租赁净义务栈约 $329 亿；偿付能力敏感、高 beta 杠杆期权。高风险/偏熊(回避-观察)
summaryEn: The AI-infra book's 'risk anchor', written deliberately bear-led. A GPU 'neocloud' that pairs a $99.4B company-defined revenue backlog (RPO plus other committed-contract amounts) and 56% adjusted EBITDA with a widening GAAP net loss (Q1 2026 -$740M), ~$24.9B debt, ~$10.1B operating lease liabilities, and $31-35B of 2026 capex (~3x revenue). Customer-concentrated (Microsoft historically >60% of revenue; CNBC cited 62% for 2024); NVIDIA is supplier + shareholder ($2B at $87) + $6.3B capacity backstop (circularity). Q1 2026 revenue $2.078B (+112%); FY2026 guide revenue $12-13B. The stock is already ~47% off 2025 peaks at ~$96, market cap ~$52B, financial net debt ~$22.9B before operating leases and ~$32.9B net obligation stack incl. operating leases. Central question: real economic demand or leverage-fueled pre-stocking? High-risk / bear-leaning (avoid-to-watch).

title: Vertiv 深度研究报告 - AI 数据中心电力与散热的卖铲人（建设速度仪表盘）
titleEn: Vertiv Deep Research Report - The Power & Cooling Pick-and-Shovel of AI Data Centers (Buildout Dashboard)
summary: 数据中心电力与热管理（含液冷）卖铲人，位于『电从哪来』(GEV/Bloom)与『芯片』(NVDA/AVGO)之间，是 AI 建设速度最实时的『仪表盘』。Q1 2026 营收$26.5亿(+30%，有机+23%、美洲有机+44%)、调整后营业利润率20.8%(+430bps)、调整后EPS $1.17(+83%)、调整后FCF $6.53亿(+147%)；最新披露的 Q4 2025 backlog $150亿(+109%)、book-to-bill ~2.9x。FY2026指引上调至营收$135-140亿、调整后EPS $6.30-6.40。但股价一年约3倍至$306.97、市值~$1,179亿、~48倍前瞻调整后EPS(~80倍滚动)，已定价多年持续建设；高beta订单簿是双刃剑。中性/高质量但高预期(观察)。
highlights: AI 数据中心电力+热管理(含液冷)卖铲人，是建设速度最实时、最难造假的『仪表盘』，可交叉校验 NVDA/AVGO/GLW/GEV/Bloom 的需求假设
液冷代际拐点(100kW+ 机柜)；Vertiv 是一线电力+热管理供应商，但公开份额/TAM估算口径分散，需按行业来源跟踪；轻杠杆(净债务~$7.6亿)自我造血
核心风险：股价一年约3倍至$306.97、~48倍前瞻调整后EPS(~80倍滚动)、市值~$1,179亿，已定价多年建设；高beta订单簿双向，AI资本开支消化/竞争(施耐德/伊顿)是主要风险
summaryEn: Power & thermal (incl. liquid cooling) pick-and-shovel for data centers, sitting between 'where power comes from' (GEV/Bloom) and 'the chips' (NVDA/AVGO) — the most real-time 'dashboard' of AI buildout velocity. Q1 2026 revenue $2.65B (+30%, +23% organic, Americas +44%), adj operating margin 20.8% (+430bps), adj EPS $1.17 (+83%), adj FCF $653M (+147%); latest disclosed Q4 2025 backlog was $15.0B (+109%) with book-to-bill ~2.9x. FY2026 guidance raised to revenue $13.5-14.0B, adj EPS $6.30-6.40. But the stock ~3x'd in a year to $306.97 / ~$117.9B / ~48x forward adj EPS (~80x trailing), pricing in years of sustained buildout; the high-beta order book cuts both ways. Neutral / high-quality but high expectations (watch).

title: 康宁 深度研究报告 - AI 基础设施的光连接卖铲人
titleEn: Corning Deep Research Report - The Optical-Connectivity Pick-and-Shovel of AI Infrastructure
summary: 2026-07-07 v5更新：AI 数据中心光纤/光缆/被动连接材料层卖铲人，与 AAOI 的有源光模块/transceiver 覆盖互补。Q1 2026核心营收$43.45亿（+18%），光通信$18.46亿（+36%，生成式AI驱动），核心营业利润率20.2%。三大客户Meta、NVIDIA、Amazon签多年期供货协议且部分客户出资。但$221.05、约71倍2026E核心EPS已资本化多年Springboard执行；30%牛市/40%基准/30%熊市情景显示预期差均衡，维持中性观察/中确信。
highlights: AI 基础设施的光纤/光缆/被动连接材料层：发明低损耗光纤的康宁，被生成式AI数据中心建设拉动，光通信Q1 2026 +36%至$18.46亿；与 AAOI 有源光模块/transceiver 覆盖互补
三大客户多年期签约且部分由客户出资：Meta最多$60亿、NVIDIA（前期约$5亿、未来累计最多约$32亿股权的认股权证，资助3座美国工厂、美国光连接产能10倍）、Amazon数十亿美元
Springboard计划兑现：核心营业利润率20.2%（提前一年达标），运行率目标2026年底约$200亿、2028约$300亿、2030约$400亿
核心风险：股价约$221（52周$51-230，约4倍重定价）、约71倍2026E核心EPS、卖方均价低于市价；约$90亿债务、AI资本开支周期性与客户集中
summaryEn: July 7, 2026 v5 update: AI data-center fiber/cable/passive-connectivity pick-and-shovel, complementary to AAOI's active optical-module/transceiver exposure. Q1 2026 core sales were $4.35B (+18%), Optical Communications was $1.85B (+36%, GenAI-driven), and core operating margin was 20.2%. Meta, NVIDIA, and Amazon signed multi-year supply deals with partial customer funding. But at $221.05 and about 71x 2026E core EPS, the market already capitalizes years of Springboard execution; a 30% bull / 40% base / 30% bear grid leaves the expectation gap balanced, so stance remains neutral watch / medium conviction.

stanceRationale.zh: 以 $221.05、约 71x 2026E 核心 EPS、约 57x 2027E 核心 EPS 计，市场正在定价数年 AI 光连接增长与 Springboard 执行；30% 牛市 / 40% 基准 / 30% 熊市情景认同方向，但认为基准情景已大体被资本化。
stanceRationale.en: At $221.05, about 71x 2026E core EPS, and about 57x 2027E core EPS, the market is underwriting several years of AI optical growth and Springboard execution; the 30% bull / 40% base / 30% bear grid agrees on direction but sees the base case already largely capitalized.

upgrade.zh: 若 Q2/2026H2 显示光通信继续 30%+ 增长、Springboard 运行率接近 2026 年底约 $200 亿路径，客户出资协议落地且 FCF 在产能爬坡中改善，同时估值倍数不再扩张，则上调至 constructive。
upgrade.en: move to constructive if Q2/H2 2026 shows Optical Communications still growing 30%+, Springboard run rate tracking toward the roughly $20B end-2026 path, customer-funded agreements closing, and FCF improving through the capacity ramp while the valuation multiple does not expand further.

downgrade.zh: 若光通信增速明显低于 AI capex 叙事、Meta/NVIDIA/Amazon 任一方放缓或重谈供货承诺，或净债务/FCF 压力在约 71x 2026E 核心 EPS 估值下加剧，则下调至 cautious。
downgrade.en: move to cautious if Optical Communications growth falls materially below the AI-capex narrative, any of Meta/NVIDIA/Amazon slows or renegotiates supply commitments, or net-debt / FCF pressure worsens at roughly 71x 2026E core EPS.

title: NVIDIA 深度研究报告 - AI 计算中枢的高质量与高预期
titleEn: NVIDIA Deep Research Report - The AI Compute Hub, High Quality Meets High Expectations
summary: v5 回填：NVIDIA 仍是 AI compute profit pool 的中枢，Q1 FY2027 营收 $81.6B、Data Center $75.2B，且 China data-center revenue 归零后仍兑现强增长。以 $192.53、约 $4.68T 市值和 mid-20s forward P/E 计，市场定价的不是泛泛 AI CAGR，而是 GPU+networking+systems+software 继续保护盈利分母。30% 牛市 / 50% 基准 / 20% 熊市情景给出温和正偏斜，因此改为偏多 / 中确信；风险仍是 hyperscaler capex、自定义 ASIC、中国和循环融资减值。
summaryEn: July 7, 2026 v5 update: NVIDIA remains the center of the AI compute profit pool. Q1 FY2027 revenue was $81.6B and Data Center was $75.2B even with China data-center revenue at zero. At $192.53, about $4.68T market cap, and a mid-20s forward P/E, the market is underwriting GPU+networking+systems+software protection of the earnings denominator, not a generic AI CAGR. A 30% bull / 50% base / 20% bear grid gives modest positive skew, so stance moves to constructive / medium conviction; the risks remain hyperscaler capex, custom ASICs, China, and circular-financing impairments.
highlights: Q1 FY2027 营收 $81.6B（+85% YoY），数据中心 $75.2B（+92%），且在中国数据中心收入归零前提下完成；Q2 FY2027 指引营收 $91.0B
毛利率回到 75%；新增 $80B 回购 + 季度股息 $0.01→$0.25，FCF 信号强；GAAP EPS $2.39 含 $15.9B 股权未实现收益，须以非 GAAP $1.87 为准
护城河三重叠加：CUDA 生态 + 全栈系统（GPU+NVLink+网络）+ 年度节奏；结构性威胁来自自定义 ASIC（Broadcom）多于 AMD
股价约 $195.74、市值约 $4.76 万亿（全球第一），但远期 P/E 约 25x 低于 AMD 约 58x；风险在盈利预期分母而非倍数。中性/观察

stanceRationale.zh: 以 $192.53、约 $4.68T 市值和 mid-20s forward P/E 计，市场定价的是 accelerator profit pool 持续扩张，而不只是泛泛的 AI CAGR；我们的基准情景认为 rack/system attach、networking/software moat 与年度平台节奏仍能保护盈利分母，同时 custom ASIC 和 China 风险尚未足以抵消该优势。
stanceRationale.en: At $192.53, roughly $4.68T market cap, and a mid-20s forward P/E, the market is pricing continued accelerator profit-pool expansion rather than a generic AI CAGR; our base case sees rack/system attach, networking/software moat, and the annual platform cadence still protecting the earnings denominator, while custom ASIC and China risks are not yet large enough to offset that advantage.

title: AAOI 深度研究报告 - AI数据中心光模块高弹性与高估值考验
titleEn: AAOI Deep Research Report - AI Data Center Optics Upside Meets a Demanding Valuation
summary: 2026-07-07 v5更新：AI数据中心光模块高弹性标的，Q1 2026营收$151.1M（+51%），Data Center收入$81.4M（+154%），800G已向大型hyperscale客户首批量产出货。Q2指引$180-198M，Q3随产能上线预计放大。但$171.23和约$13.51B EV已定价从$507M TTM收入迈向2027年$1.5B+收入、35%+毛利率和15%+经营利润率路径；30%牛市/30%基准/40%熊市情景给出负预期差，改为谨慎/中确信。
summaryEn: July 7, 2026 v5 update: High-beta AI data-center optical-module exposure. Q1 2026 revenue was $151.1M (+51%), Data Center revenue was $81.4M (+154%), and 800G products began initial mass-production shipments to a large hyperscale customer. Q2 guidance is $180-198M, with Q3 expected to step up as capacity comes online. But $171.23 and about $13.51B EV already price a path from $507M TTM revenue toward $1.5B+ 2027 revenue, 35%+ gross margin, and 15%+ operating margin; a 30% bull / 30% base / 40% bear grid gives a negative expectation gap, moving stance to cautious / medium conviction.
highlights: 800G产品Q1已向大型hyperscale客户首批量产出货，Q2开始ramp，Q3随产能上线预计显著放大
Q1末800G transceiver月产能接近100,000只，美国和台湾扩产支撑AI光模块交付
股价约$171.23、市值约$137亿，EV/TTM Sales约26.6x；GAAP仍亏损、现金流和稀释风险需要严密跟踪

stanceRationale.zh: 以 $171.23 和约 $13.51B EV 计，市场正在定价从约 $507M TTM 收入迈向 2027 年 $1.5B+ 收入、35%+ 毛利率和可信 15%+ 经营利润率路径；30% 牛市 / 30% 基准 / 40% 熊市情景把更高权重放在客户集中、现金流、稀释和产能执行风险上。
stanceRationale.en: At $171.23 and about $13.51B EV, the market is underwriting a path from roughly $507M TTM revenue toward $1.5B+ 2027 revenue, 35%+ gross margin, and a credible 15%+ operating-margin path; the 30% bull / 30% base / 40% bear grid puts more weight on concentration, cash-flow, dilution, and capacity-execution risk.

upgrade.zh: 若 Q2 收入达到或高于 $198M、Q3 指引显示收入阶跃，毛利率突破 31% 且经营现金流/应收库存压力改善，同时新增 hyperscale 客户降低单一客户集中，则上调至 neutral-watch 或 constructive。
upgrade.en: move to neutral-watch or constructive if Q2 revenue lands at or above $198M, Q3 guidance shows a revenue step-up, gross margin breaks above 31% with operating-cash-flow / receivables-inventory pressure improving, and new hyperscale customers reduce single-customer concentration.

downgrade.zh: 若 Q2 低于 $180M 或 Q3 指引保守、毛利率维持 29-30% 且现金流仍深度为负，或 ATM 稀释继续快于收入证明，则下调至 bearish-avoid。
downgrade.en: move to bearish-avoid if Q2 revenue falls below $180M or Q3 guidance is cautious, gross margin stays at 29-30% with deeply negative cash flow, or ATM dilution continues faster than revenue proof.

title: GE Vernova 深度研究报告 - AI 电力侧的卖铲人与燃气轮机超级周期
titleEn: GE Vernova Deep Research Report - The Pick-and-Shovel of AI's Power Side and the Gas-Turbine Super-Cycle
summary: AI「电力侧」瓶颈最直接的卖铲人：数据中心电力短缺同时拉动燃气轮机（Power）与电网设备（Electrification）。Q1 2026 订单 $18.3B、backlog $163B（2027 目标 $200B，从 2028 提前），燃气轮机 backlog+slot 预留年底目标 ≥110 GW；Q1 营收 $9.34B、调整后 EBITDA $896M（利润率 9.6%），并上调 FY2026 指引（营收 $44.5-45.5B、调整后 EBITDA 利润率 12-14%、FCF $6.5-7.5B）。利润率正从 FY2025 的 8.4% 向中两位数爬坡。但近一年 +117%、市值约 $2,840 亿，EV/2026E 调整后 EBITDA 约 45-48x，已计入多年爬坡，且与 AI capex 共命运、Wind 仍亏损。Q1 现金 $10.2B、senior notes $2.6B，粗略净现金约 $7.6B。中性/高质量但高预期（观察）。
summaryEn: The most direct pick-and-shovel of AI's power-side bottleneck: data-center electricity shortage pulls both gas turbines (Power) and grid equipment (Electrification). Q1 2026 orders $18.3B, backlog $163B (2027 target $200B, pulled forward from 2028), gas-turbine backlog+slots targeting >=110 GW by year-end; Q1 revenue $9.34B and adjusted EBITDA $896M (9.6% margin), with raised FY2026 guidance (revenue $44.5-45.5B, adjusted EBITDA margin 12-14%, FCF $6.5-7.5B). Margins are climbing from FY2025's 8.4% toward the mid-teens. But up ~117% in a year at a ~$284B market cap, EV/2026E adjusted EBITDA ~45-48x already prices the multi-year ramp, it shares fate with AI capex, and Wind is still loss-making. Q1 cash $10.2B, senior notes $2.6B, rough net cash ~$7.6B. Neutral / high-quality-but-high-expectations (watch).

title: SanDisk 深度研究报告 - NAND寡头格局中的AI存储周期暴露
titleEn: SanDisk Deep Research Report - AI Storage Cycle Exposure in the NAND Oligopoly
summary: v5 回填：SanDisk Q3 FY2026 营收 $5.95B、数据中心 $1.47B、GAAP 毛利率 78.4%、FCF $2.99B、零债务，五份 NBM 长协带来约 $42B 最低合同收入框架。但以 $2,090.71 价格锚点和 Q4 年化 EPS 约 $120-132 计，当前价格在 12-15x memory-cycle 框架下隐含约 $139-174 的通过周期可持续 EPS。20% 牛市 / 40% 基准 / 40% 熊市情景把峰值 NAND 盈利均值回归风险放在前面，因此改为谨慎 / 中确信。
highlights: 全球最大纯NAND闪存公司，2025年初从WDC分拆独立，市值约$3,096亿
Q3 FY2026营收$59.5亿（+97% Q/Q），数据中心$14.67亿（+233% Q/Q），GAAP毛利率78.4%、营业利润率69.1%、EPS $23.03，FCF $29.9亿，零负债。Q4指引营收$77.5-82.5亿、Non-GAAP EPS $30-33、毛利率79-81%。约16倍FY2026E P/S，但NAND周期性极强，78%+毛利率不可持续
NAND上行周期+AI数据中心存储需求双重驱动，零负债、单季FCF $29.9亿
五份NBM长期供货协议锁定约$420亿最低合同收入、>$110亿财务担保、覆盖FY2027逾1/3 bit出货（管理层电话会口径，待合同披露），是『去周期化』核心尝试；并授权$60亿股份回购
核心风险：NAND周期性极强，78%+顶峰毛利率不可持续；周期转向时盈利与估值双向收缩
summaryEn: July 7, 2026 v5 update: SanDisk Q3 FY2026 revenue was $5.95B, Datacenter revenue was $1.47B, GAAP gross margin was 78.4%, FCF was $2.99B, and debt was zero; five NBM agreements frame about $42B of minimum contracted revenue. But at the $2,090.71 price anchor and Q4 annualized EPS of about $120-132, the current price implies roughly $139-174 of through-cycle sustainable EPS on a 12-15x memory-cycle framework. A 20% bull / 40% base / 40% bear grid foregrounds peak NAND mean-reversion risk, moving stance to cautious / medium conviction.

stanceRationale.zh: 以 $2,090.71 计，市场在 12-15x memory-cycle 框架下隐含约 $139-174 的通过周期可持续 EPS，高于 Q4 年化 EPS 指引约 $120-132；我们的 20% 牛市 / 40% 基准 / 40% 熊市情景网格说明，NBM 结构尚未证明峰值 NAND 盈利可持续。
stanceRationale.en: At $2,090.71, the market implies roughly $139-174 of through-cycle sustainable EPS on a 12-15x memory-cycle framework, above the Q4 annualized EPS guide of about $120-132; the 20% bull / 40% base / 40% bear grid says the NBM structure has not yet proved peak NAND earnings are sustainable.

upgrade.zh: 若 FY2026 Q4 兑现 $77.5-82.5 亿收入与 79-81% 毛利率指引、NBM 合同披露确认约 $420 亿最低收入且覆盖 FY2027 过半 bit，同时 NAND 合约价和行业 capex 仍显示供给纪律，则上调至 neutral-watch 或 constructive。
upgrade.en: move to neutral-watch or constructive if FY2026 Q4 delivers the $7.75-8.25B revenue and 79-81% gross-margin guide, NBM filings confirm roughly $42B of minimum revenue with coverage moving toward more than half of FY2027 bits, and NAND contract prices plus industry capex still show supply discipline.

downgrade.zh: 若 NAND 合约价连续转弱、毛利率从 78-80% 峰值明显回落、NBM 覆盖或担保条款低于管理层口径，或 SanDisk/铠侠新增产能指向 2027 供给过剩，则下调至 bearish-avoid。
downgrade.en: move to bearish-avoid if NAND contract prices weaken for consecutive periods, gross margin falls materially from the 78-80% peak, NBM coverage or guarantees fall short of management's framing, or SanDisk/Kioxia capacity additions point to 2027 oversupply.

title: SK hynix 深度研究报告 - HBM垄断者的AI记忆霸权
titleEn: SK hynix Deep Research Report - The HBM Monopolist's AI Memory Dominance
summary: v5 回填：SK hynix 仍是全球 HBM 领导者，Q1 2026 营收 ₩52.6T、营业利润 ₩37.6T、营业利润率约 72%，但自 2 月以来股价约上涨 3.5 倍，价格锚点 ₩2,917,000 对应约 28x TTM P/E 和约 16x sales。20% 牛市 / 50% 基准 / 30% 熊市情景说明 HBM 质量真实，但当前价格已经资本化接近峰值的盈利能力，因此改为谨慎 / 中确信。
highlights: Q1 2026创纪录：营收₩52.6万亿（+198% YoY，+60% QoQ）、营业利润₩37.6万亿（72%利润率）、净利₩40.3万亿
自2月以来股价约涨3.5倍、市值突破$1.3万亿（约₩2,070万亿，价格×约7.08亿股）；TTM P/E约28x，深度价值逻辑已基本兑现
HBM全球份额53%、NVIDIA主供，未来三年需求已超供给；HBM4E样品H2 2026、量产2027
72%营业利润率接近周期峰值，均值回归与HBM4竞争是核心风险；韩股上市，EWY为便捷间接途径
summaryEn: July 7, 2026 v5 update: SK hynix remains the global HBM leader, with Q1 2026 revenue of ₩52.6T, operating profit of ₩37.6T, and roughly 72% operating margin. But the stock has risen about 3.5x since February, and the ₩2,917,000 price anchor implies about 28x TTM P/E and roughly 16x sales. A 20% bull / 50% base / 30% bear grid says HBM quality is real, but the current price already capitalizes near-peak profitability, moving stance to cautious / medium conviction.

title: AMD 深度研究报告 - AI时代的半导体挑战者
titleEn: AMD Deep Research Report - AI Era Semiconductor Challenger
summary: v5 回填：AMD Q1 2026 营收 $10.253B、Data Center 约 $5.8B，Meta 6GW、Helios/MI450、EPYC 与 ROCm 让 AI infrastructure 第二平台叙事更强。但以 $537.37、约 $878B EV 和约 23.4x EV/TTM Sales 计，市场已经提前定价 Meta/Helios、MI450、ROCm 改善、Data Center 增长和利润率扩张；20% 牛市 / 40% 基准 / 40% 熊市情景给出负偏斜，因此改为谨慎 / 中确信。
summaryEn: July 7, 2026 v5 update: AMD Q1 2026 revenue was $10.253B and Data Center was about $5.8B, while Meta 6GW, Helios/MI450, EPYC, and ROCm strengthen the second-platform AI infrastructure story. But at $537.37, about $878B EV, and roughly 23.4x EV/TTM Sales, the market already prices Meta/Helios, MI450, ROCm improvement, Data Center growth, and margin expansion; a 20% bull / 40% base / 40% bear grid gives negative skew, moving stance to cautious / medium conviction.
highlights: 完整重跑后结论调整为中性/观察：基本面增强，但估值容错极低
Q1 2026营收$102.53亿（+38% YoY），Data Center约$58亿（+57% YoY）
Meta多年6GW Instinct GPU合作，首个1GW预计2026下半年出货，是H2验证核心
股价约$537、市值约$8,870亿；EV/TTM Sales约23.4x，当前价格接近bull case下沿

trigger.en: the first 1GW ships on schedule in H2 2026 — the core H2 test

latest.zh: 多年 6GW 合作；Helios/MI450 强化平台叙事
latest.en: multi-year 6GW deal; Helios/MI450 strengthen the platform story

monitoring.nextCheck: 2026-H2 出货确认 / H2 shipment confirmation

trigger.zh: DC 增速失速将直接打击高预期定价
trigger.en: a DC growth stall directly hits the high-expectations pricing

monitoring.nextCheck: 2026-Q2 财报 / Q2 earnings

trigger.zh: 约 23.4x EV/TTM Sales、价格接近 bull case 下沿时的倍数压缩
trigger.en: multiple compression from ~23.4x EV/TTM Sales with price near the bull-case floor

monitoring.nextCheck: 2026-Q2 财报 / Q2 earnings

stanceRationale.zh: 以 $537.37、约 $8,780 亿 EV 和约 23.4x EV/TTM Sales 计，市场已经把 Meta/Helios、MI450、ROCm 改善、Data Center 增速和利润率扩张放进价格；我们的基准情景同意基本面变强，但认为这些证据尚不足以覆盖当前 multiple，因此预期差偏负。
stanceRationale.en: At $537.37, roughly $878B EV, and about 23.4x EV/TTM Sales, the market already prices Meta/Helios, MI450, ROCm improvement, Data Center growth, and margin expansion; our base case agrees that fundamentals are stronger, but the evidence is not yet enough to cover the current multiple, so the expectation gap is negative.

upgrade.zh: 若 2026H2 首个 1GW Meta deployment 按期出货并进入收入、Data Center 增速和 56%+ non-GAAP gross margin 同时兑现，ROCm/Helios 证明可重复客户迁移，且 EV/TTM Sales 从约 23.4x 被收入分母消化，则上调至 neutral-watch 或 constructive。
upgrade.en: Move to neutral-watch or constructive if the first 1GW Meta deployment ships on schedule in H2 2026 and enters revenue, Data Center growth and 56%+ non-GAAP gross margin both deliver, ROCm/Helios prove repeatable customer migration, and EV/TTM Sales is absorbed from roughly 23.4x by the revenue denominator.

downgrade.zh: 若 Meta 1GW 或 6GW 路径延期/缩小、Data Center 增速低于公司整体、ROCm 没有可审计迁移证据，或 custom ASIC/NVIDIA Rubin 压缩 AMD 的 rack-level 性价比窗口，则下调至 bearish-avoid。
downgrade.en: Move to bearish-avoid if the Meta 1GW or 6GW path is delayed/reduced, Data Center growth falls below company-level growth, ROCm lacks auditable migration evidence, or custom ASICs / NVIDIA Rubin compress AMD's rack-level price-performance window.

title: Broadcom 深度研究报告 - 自定义 AI 硅的卖铲人与 VMware 现金机器
titleEn: Broadcom Deep Research Report - The Pick-and-Shovel of Custom AI Silicon, Plus a VMware Cash Machine
summary: 自定义 AI 硅（XPU）最大的卖铲人，正是 NVIDIA 报告点名的最深结构性威胁的承接方；同时握有 VMware 软件现金机器。Q2 FY2026 营收 $22.19B（+48%），AI 半导体 $10.8B（+143%），AI backlog >$30B，FY2027 AI 目标 >$1000 亿；Google/Meta/字节/Anthropic/OpenAI/Fujitsu 等客户项目与 $73B backlog 属公开报道/市场拆解口径，非全部官方确认。但收入兑现后置到 FY2027、客户高度集中、总债务 $64.9B、净债务约 $45B。市值约 $1.8 万亿、远期 P/E 约 33x，介于 NVIDIA ~25x 与 AMD ~58x 之间。neutral-watch / 中等确信：世界级卖铲人，但 FY2027 分母大多已被定价。
summaryEn: The biggest pick-and-shovel of custom AI silicon (XPUs) - the very threat named in the NVIDIA report - plus a VMware software cash machine. Q2 FY2026 revenue $22.19B (+48%), AI semis $10.8B (+143%), AI backlog >$30B, FY2027 AI target >$100B; customer programs such as Google/Meta/ByteDance/Anthropic/OpenAI/Fujitsu and the $73B backlog are public-reporting / market-breakdown inputs, not all official confirmations. Delivery is back-loaded to FY2027, customers are concentrated, total debt is $64.9B and net debt is roughly $45B. Market cap ~$1.8T, forward P/E ~33x, between NVIDIA ~25x and AMD ~58x. Neutral-watch / medium conviction: a world-class pick-and-shovel, but the FY2027 denominator is mostly priced in.
highlights: FY2027 AI 半导体目标 >$1000 亿；公开报道涉及 Google/Meta/字节/Anthropic/OpenAI/Fujitsu 等 XPU 项目与 $73B backlog 估算——但兑现后置到 FY2027、客户高度集中，非全部为官方确认订单
两台引擎：AI 定制硅增长 + VMware 软件现金（非 GAAP 营业利润率 67%、FCF 占收入 46%）；总债务 $64.9B、Q2 期末现金 $19.63B，净债务约 $45B
neutral-watch / 中等确信：$378.91、约 24-25x EV/TTM sales 已定价通向 FY2027 >$100B AI 收入的顺利路径，等待更硬的 XPU 兑现和 backlog 转化证据

trigger.zh: >$1000 亿 FY2027 AI 目标的后置兑现节奏出现缺口

stanceRationale.zh: 在 $378.91、约 24-25x EV/TTM sales 上，市场已经定价了通向 FY2027 >$100B AI 半导体的顺利路径和持续的 VMware 现金质量；我们的基准情景同意方向，但保留交付滑坡、客户集中和债务调整后倍数压力。
stanceRationale.en: At $378.91 and roughly 24-25x EV/TTM sales, the market already prices a clean path toward >$100B FY2027 AI semis plus durable VMware cash; our base case agrees on direction but leaves room for delivery slippage, customer concentration, and debt-adjusted multiple pressure.

upgrade.zh: 若 Q3/Q4 AI 半导体收入和 backlog 转化确认通向 FY2027 >$100B AI 收入的路径、至少一个新增 XPU 客户获得官方确认、VMware 留存保持稳定，且 net debt/EBITDA 持续下降，则上调至 constructive。
upgrade.en: move to constructive if Q3/Q4 AI semi revenue and backlog conversion confirm the path toward >$100B FY2027 AI revenue, at least one additional XPU customer is officially confirmed, VMware retention remains stable, and net debt/EBITDA keeps falling.

downgrade.zh: 若主要 XPU 客户滑坡或切换、AI backlog 停止扩张、VMware 流失显性化，或 FY2027 AI 收入可见度变弱时债务调整后的 EV 仍居高不下，则下调至 cautious。
downgrade.en: move to cautious if a major XPU customer slips or switches, AI backlog stops expanding, VMware churn becomes visible, or debt-adjusted EV remains elevated while FY2027 AI revenue visibility weakens.

title: TSMC 深度研究报告 - AI 基建链的先进制程与封装公共约束
titleEn: TSMC Deep Research Report - The Advanced-Node and Packaging Constraint in AI Infrastructure
summary: AI 基础设施书 foundry 层补位：TSMC 是整条链最硬的制造瓶颈，而不是又一个芯片设计公司。2026Q1 收入 $35.90B、毛利率 66.2%、营业利润率 58.1%，Q2 指引 $39.0-40.2B；Jan-May 2026 月度收入合计 NT$1.962T（+30.0%），May 收入 NT$416.975B（+30.1%）。AI/HPC 需求已经穿透到晶圆收入、先进节点和先进封装；但 ADR $434.16（2026-07-02 收盘）、市值约 $2.25T、2026E EV/Sales 约 14x，约定价未来三年 ~21% 收入 CAGR 与 60%+ 毛利。中性观察 / 中确信：高质量但基本被定价；链内角色是 foundry 层 common-constraint。
summaryEn: Foundry-layer coverage for the AI-infrastructure book: TSMC is the hard manufacturing bottleneck in the chain, not another chip designer. 2026Q1 revenue was $35.90B, gross margin was 66.2%, operating margin was 58.1%, and Q2 guidance is $39.0-40.2B; Jan-May 2026 revenue reached NT$1.962T (+30.0%), and May revenue was NT$416.975B (+30.1%). AI/HPC demand has reached wafer revenue, advanced nodes, and advanced packaging. But at a $434.16 ADR close on Jul 2, 2026, roughly $2.25T market cap, and about 14x 2026E EV/Sales, the market is underwriting about 21% three-year revenue CAGR with 60%+ gross margin. Neutral watch / medium conviction: high quality but mostly priced in; chain role is foundry common constraint.
highlights: foundry 层补位：TSMC 是 AI 基建链的制造公共约束，用先进制程、CoWoS/3DFabric、N3/N2 和客户排产验证 AI 需求是否真的穿透到上游制造瓶颈
公开资料显示 HPC 约占 Q1 收入 61%，7nm 及以下先进节点约占 wafer revenue 74%；2026 capex $52-56B，重点投向先进制程、先进封装和全球制造扩建
当前 ADR $434.16（2026-07-02 收盘）、市值约 $2.25T、净现金约 $75B，2026E EV/Sales 约 14x；30/50/20 情景权重推导为中性观察 / 中确信，核心监控是利用率、N3/N2、CoWoS、客户集中和海外 fab 毛利拖累

title: Micron Technology 深度研究报告 - AI memory 周期的 HBM/DRAM/NAND 仪表盘
titleEn: Micron Technology Deep Research Report - HBM, DRAM, and NAND Dashboard for the AI Memory Cycle
summary: AI 基础设施书 memory-storage 层补位：Micron 是 HBM、DDR5、数据中心 SSD 和长期供货协议共同构成的 AI 供给瓶颈仪表盘。FY2026 Q3 收入 $41.46B、毛利率约 84.6%、营业利润 $33.32B、净利润 $28.24B，Q4 指引收入 $49-51B、调整后 EPS $30-32、毛利率约 86%。HBM 产能公开报道显示已售罄至 2026，16 个战略客户协议中 14 个最低合同收入约 $100B、约 $22B 现金存款/承诺。2026-07-07 v5 更新：当前 $975.56（2026-07-02 收盘）、市值约 $1.10T，20% 牛市 / 50% 基准 / 30% 熊市情景网格给出温和负偏斜，判断改为谨慎 / 中确信：市场隐含通过周期可持续 EPS 约 $65-81，高于我们约 $53 的加权值，周期均值回归风险未被完全定价。
summaryEn: Memory-storage coverage for the AI-infrastructure book: Micron is the dashboard for HBM, DDR5, data-center SSDs, and long-term supply agreements as AI supply constraints move into memory. FY2026 Q3 revenue was $41.46B, gross margin about 84.6%, operating income $33.32B, and net income $28.24B; Q4 guidance is $49-51B revenue, $30-32 adjusted EPS, and about 86% gross margin. Public reports say HBM capacity is sold out through 2026, and 14 of 16 strategic customer agreements have about $100B of minimum contract revenue plus roughly $22B deposits / commitments. July 7, 2026 v5 update: at $975.56 (Jul 2, 2026 close) and about $1.10T market cap, a 20% bull / 50% base / 30% bear scenario grid produces a mildly negative skew, so the stance moves to cautious / medium conviction: the market is underwriting roughly $65-81 of through-cycle sustainable EPS versus our about $53 weighted value, so memory mean-reversion risk is not fully priced.
highlights: memory-storage 层补位：MU 用 HBM sold-out、DRAM/NAND 价格、数据中心 SSD 和 SCA 长期协议校验 AI 需求是否穿透到 memory bit/带宽/价格
16 个 SCA 中 14 个最低合同收入约 $100B，约 $22B 存款/承诺；公开报道显示 HBM 产能售罄至 2026，且只能满足约 50%-66% 客户需求
当前 $975.56（2026-07-02 收盘）、市值约 $1.10T、净现金约 $19.6B，TTM P/E 约 22x（Q4 年化 run-rate 仅约 7.9x）。20/50/30 情景网格推导为谨慎 / 中确信：隐含可持续 EPS $65-81 高于我们约 $53 的加权值，负偏斜

stanceRationale.zh: 以 $975.56、约 22x TTM P/E（Q4 年化 run-rate 仅约 7.9x）计，市场隐含通过周期可持续 EPS 约 $65-81；我们 20% 牛市 / 50% 基准 / 30% 熊市加权的可持续 EPS 约 $53，低于隐含区间，周期均值回归风险未被完全定价，偏斜向下。
stanceRationale.en: At $975.56 and about 22x TTM P/E (only about 7.9x on the Q4 annualized run rate), the market is underwriting roughly $65-81 of through-cycle sustainable EPS; our 20% bull / 50% base / 30% bear weighted sustainable EPS is about $53, below that implied band, so memory mean-reversion risk is not fully priced and the skew points down.

title: Constellation Energy 深度研究报告 - AI 电力约束的核电与 Calpine 综合电力锚
titleEn: Constellation Energy Deep Research Report - Nuclear and Calpine Integrated Power Anchor for AI
summary: AI 基础设施 power 层可调度电力公共约束覆盖。Constellation 不是 GPU 供应商，也不再是纯核电故事；2026-01-07 完成 Calpine 后，它是核电主导、叠加天然气/地热容量的综合电力平台。2026Q1 收入 $11.12B、净利润 $1.59B，报道 EPS $2.74、核电发电量约 44,666 GWh，公司维持 2026 EPS 指引 $11-12；Microsoft/Crane Clean Energy Center（Three Mile Island Unit 1）重启目标指向 2027，Meta 也已与 CEG 签过约 1.1GW 核电 PPA，Calpine 则带来约 55GW 合并平台里的可调度容量与 powered-land optionality。当前 $239.25（2026-07-02 收盘）、市值约 $85.4B、企业价值约 $107B，估值已经反映 AI 电力稀缺，后续应重点验证 PPA 执行、Crane restart 监管路径、Calpine 整合、PJM 容量价格和资产负债表资本纪律。中性观察 / power common-constraint。
highlights: 补齐 AI 基建 power 层可调度电力公共约束：CEG 用既有核电 fleet、Calpine 天然气/地热容量、长期 PPA 和 PJM 容量价格验证 AI 数据中心是否真的愿意为稳定清洁电力与可调度容量付溢价
2026Q1 收入 $11.12B、净利润 $1.59B、报道 EPS $2.74，核电发电量约 44,666 GWh，公司维持 2026 EPS 指引 $11-12
Microsoft/Crane Clean Energy Center（Three Mile Island Unit 1）重启目标指向 2027，Meta 约 1.1GW 核电 PPA 说明 hyperscaler 电力需求正在合同化；Calpine 把叙事从纯核电扩展到可调度容量
当前 $239.25（2026-07-02）、市值约 $85.4B、EV 约 $107B、约 3.6x EV/TTM sales；质量高但 AI power 溢价已明显，需要持续验证监管、Calpine 整合、PJM 容量价格和资本纪律
summaryEn: Initial coverage of the dispatchable-power common constraint in the AI-infrastructure power layer. Constellation is not a GPU supplier, and it is no longer a pure nuclear story; after closing Calpine on Jan. 7, 2026, it is a nuclear-led integrated power platform with added natural-gas and geothermal capacity. Q1 2026 revenue was $11.12B, net income $1.59B, reported EPS $2.74, nuclear generation about 44,666 GWh, and management maintained 2026 EPS guidance of $11-12. Microsoft/Crane Clean Energy Center (Three Mile Island Unit 1) restart targets 2027, Meta has signed about a 1.1GW nuclear PPA with Constellation, and Calpine adds dispatchable-capacity and powered-land optionality to a roughly 55GW combined platform. At $239.25 (2026-07-02 close), about $85.4B market cap and about $107B enterprise value, the stock already embeds an AI-power scarcity premium. The key checks are PPA execution, Crane restart regulation, Calpine integration, PJM capacity pricing and balance-sheet discipline. Neutral watch / power common constraint.

title: Vistra 深度研究报告 - AI 电力约束的核电与燃气高 beta 仪表盘
titleEn: Vistra Deep Research Report - Nuclear and Gas High-Beta Dashboard for AI Power
summary: AI 基础设施 power 层的高 beta 仪表盘，与 Constellation Energy 成对覆盖。Vistra 同时拥有核电、燃气和零售/merchant power 暴露，用来验证 AI 数据中心需求是否从『清洁 baseload PPA』扩散到『可调度燃气容量、PJM/Texas 容量价值和现有发电资产重定价』。2026Q1 收入 $5.64B、净利润 $1.03B、营业利润 $1.50B、FCF $316M；Meta 20 年核电协议覆盖 Perry、Davis-Besse 与 Beaver Valley uprates，公开报道约 2.2GW；Cogentrix 交易主口径约 $4B net purchase price，公开 seller-side 报道也有约 $4.7B total consideration 口径，将增加约 5,500MW 燃气容量，预计 2026 年中后期完成。当前 $151.05（2026-07-02 收盘）、市值约 $50.9B、EV 约 $70.2B、约 3.6x EV/TTM sales；估值低于 CEG，但杠杆、气价、监管和容量市场波动更高。高风险观察 / power dashboard。
highlights: 与 CEG 成对覆盖 power 层：VST 是核电 + 燃气 + merchant power 的高 beta 仪表盘，检验 AI 电力需求是否扩散到可调度容量
2026Q1 收入 $5.64B、净利润 $1.03B、营业利润 $1.50B、FCF $316M；Q1 净债务约 $19.3B
Meta 20 年核电协议覆盖 Perry、Davis-Besse、Beaver Valley uprates，公开报道约 2.2GW；Cogentrix 交易主口径约 $4B net purchase price，seller-side 公开报道也有约 $4.7B total consideration 口径，将增加约 5,500MW 燃气容量
当前 $151.05（2026-07-02）、市值约 $50.9B、EV 约 $70.2B、约 3.6x EV/TTM sales；估值低于 CEG，但气价、监管、杠杆和容量市场回撤风险更高
summaryEn: High-beta dashboard coverage for the AI-infrastructure power layer, paired with Constellation Energy. Vistra combines nuclear, gas and retail/merchant-power exposure, testing whether AI data-center demand spreads from clean baseload PPAs into dispatchable gas capacity, PJM/Texas capacity value and the repricing of existing generation assets. Q1 2026 revenue was $5.64B, net income $1.03B, operating income $1.50B and FCF $316M. Meta's 20-year nuclear agreement covers Perry, Davis-Besse and Beaver Valley uprates, with public reporting around 2.2GW; the Cogentrix transaction is framed at about a $4B net purchase price, while public seller-side reporting has also framed it near $4.7B total consideration, and would add about 5,500MW of gas capacity with an expected mid-to-late 2026 close. At $151.05 (2026-07-02 close), about $50.9B market cap, about $70.2B EV and about 3.6x EV/TTM sales, Vistra trades below Constellation but carries more leverage, gas, regulatory and capacity-market risk. High-risk watch / power dashboard.

title: Meta Platforms 深度研究报告 - AI 基建书的需求锚与算力外售压力测试
titleEn: Meta Platforms Deep Research Report - Demand Anchor and Compute-Resale Stress Test for the AI-Infra Book
summary: 本中心 AI 基础设施书 demand-risk 层的需求锚覆盖：Meta 不是 GPU/HBM/电力/光模块供应商，而是整条链最重要的终端买方之一。Q1 2026 收入 $56.31B(+33%)、营业利润 $22.87B、经营现金流 $32.23B、自由现金流 $13.23B，说明广告主业仍能融资 AI 建设；但公司把 2026 capex 指引抬到 $125-145B，且 7 月初被报道考虑推出 Meta Compute、外售过剩 AI 算力。股价 $582.90（2026-07-02 收盘）、市值约 $1.48T、约 6.9x TTM P/S、约 17x EV/TTM 营业利润，按 Q1 剔除约 $8B 税益 EPS 年化约 20x。核心读数：Meta capex 若继续被广告/AI 产品吸收，AI 基建链需求得到支撑；若外售算力意味着供给过剩或内部需求不足，则 CoreWeave/Nebius、HBM、光连接和电力链都要下修稀缺假设。中性/高质量但高 capex 风险（观察）。
highlights: demand-risk 层需求锚：Meta 是 AI 基建链最大终端买方之一，决定 GPU、HBM、网络、光连接、电力、设施和 neocloud 需求是否真实
Q1 2026 收入 $56.31B(+33%)、营业利润 $22.87B、经营现金流 $32.23B、FCF $13.23B；广告主业仍能支撑大额 AI 投入
核心风险是 capex 斜率：2026 指引 $125-145B；7 月初 Meta Compute / 外售过剩 AI 算力报道使 capacity-resale 成为整本书的关键交叉校验
股价 $582.90(2026-07-02)、市值约 $1.48T、约 6.9x TTM P/S、约 17x EV/TTM 营业利润；静态倍数不极端，但 FCF/算力价格风险很高。中性/观察
summaryEn: Demand-anchor coverage for this center's AI-infrastructure demand-risk layer: Meta is not a GPU/HBM/power/optical supplier, but one of the most important end customers in the chain. Q1 2026 revenue was $56.31B (+33%), operating income $22.87B, operating cash flow $32.23B, and free cash flow $13.23B, showing the ad engine can still fund AI buildout. But Meta raised its 2026 capex guide to $125-145B and was reported in early July to be considering Meta Compute, a business that could sell excess AI compute. At $582.90 (Jul 2 2026 close), market cap is about $1.48T, around 6.9x TTM sales and about 17x EV/TTM operating income; annualized Q1 EPS excluding an approximately $8B tax benefit implies roughly 20x earnings. Core read-through: if Meta capex keeps being absorbed by advertising and AI products, AI-infra demand is validated; if compute resale signals oversupply or insufficient internal demand, CoreWeave/Nebius, HBM, optical, and power-chain scarcity assumptions need to be marked down. Neutral / high-quality but high capex risk (watch).

title: Oracle 深度研究报告 - AI 云 RPO 仪表盘与资本开支融资压力
titleEn: Oracle Deep Research Report - AI Cloud RPO Dashboard and Capex Financing Pressure
summary: AI 基础设施书 demand-risk 层的 RPO/backlog 仪表盘：Oracle 正从成熟数据库/企业软件公司变成高资本强度 AI 云基础设施平台。FY2026 Q4 收入 $19.18B(+21%)、OCI 收入 $5.8B(+93%)、RPO 达 $638B(+363%)，需求读数极强；但 FY2026 capex $55.66B、自由现金流 -$23.69B、FY2027 capex 指引可达 $90-95B，且公司需要约 $40B 债务+股权融资。当前股价 $140.27（2026-07-02 收盘）、市值约 $404B、按总债务 $156.19B 减现金+短投 $31.89B 计算的净债务约 $124.30B、企业价值约 $528B，对应约 7.8x TTM EV/Sales 和约 23.5x EV/TTM 营业利润。高风险观察 / 订单质量仪表盘：关键不是订单多不多，而是 RPO 能否按期转化为高回报现金流。
summaryEn: The RPO/backlog dashboard for the AI-infrastructure book's demand-risk layer: Oracle is changing from a mature database and enterprise-software company into a capital-intensive AI-cloud infrastructure platform. FY2026 Q4 revenue was $19.18B (+21%), OCI revenue was $5.8B (+93%), and RPO reached $638B (+363%), making the demand readout very strong. But FY2026 capex was $55.66B, free cash flow was -$23.69B, FY2027 capex could reach $90-95B, and the company expects roughly $40B of debt and equity financing. At $140.27 (Jul 2, 2026 close), roughly $404B market cap, about $124.30B net debt using total debt of $156.19B less cash+ST investments of $31.89B, and about $528B enterprise value, ORCL trades near 7.8x TTM EV/Sales and about 23.5x EV/TTM operating income. High-risk watch / order-quality dashboard: the key question is whether RPO converts into high-return cash flow on schedule.
highlights: demand-risk 层的 RPO/backlog 仪表盘：FY2026 Q4 RPO $638B(+363%，环比 +$85B)，OCI 收入 $5.8B(+93%)，验证 AI 云需求是否穿透到订单簿
现金流和融资压力同样极端：FY2026 capex $55.66B、FCF -$23.69B；FY2027 capex 指引 $90-95B，另需约 $40B 债务+股权融资，含 $20B ATM 股权发行
当前 $140.27（2026-07-02 收盘）、约 $404B 市值、约 $124.30B 净债务、约 $528B 企业价值，对应约 7.8x TTM EV/Sales、约 23.5x EV/TTM 营业利润；传统软件利润表与 AI 基建资产负债表叙事并存
核心监控不是『订单多不多』，而是 RPO 转化、客户集中、OCI 毛利/ROIC、capex 是否按时变成可售 capacity，以及融资是否伤害股东

title: Marvell Technology 深度研究报告 - Broadcom 之外的 custom ASIC 与光互连架构校验
titleEn: Marvell Technology Deep Research Report - Custom ASIC and Optical Interconnect Check Beyond Broadcom
summary: AI 基础设施书 custom-merchant-silicon 层补位：Marvell 是 Broadcom 之外的自定义 ASIC/XPU、光互连和 NVIDIA NVLink Fusion 对照组。FY2027 Q1 收入约 $2.42B，公开报道数据中心收入约 $1.83B；管理层公开展望 FY2027/FY2028 收入约 $11.5B/$16.5B。NVIDIA $2B 投资 + NVLink Fusion、Celestial AI $3.25B 收购、AWS Trainium/Microsoft Maia 机会共同抬高长期想象空间。但当前 $245.29（2026-07-02 收盘）、市值约 $214.6B、约 19x FY2027E EV/Sales，执行容错率很低。cautious / 中等确信：真实期权仍在，但当前价格下偏斜为负。
summaryEn: Custom-merchant-silicon coverage for the AI-infrastructure book: Marvell is the custom ASIC / XPU, optical interconnect, and NVIDIA NVLink Fusion cross-check outside Broadcom. FY2027 Q1 revenue was about $2.42B, public reports put data-center revenue near $1.83B, and management's public outlook frames FY2027 / FY2028 revenue around $11.5B / $16.5B. NVIDIA's $2B investment plus NVLink Fusion, the $3.25B Celestial AI acquisition, and AWS Trainium / Microsoft Maia opportunities all expand long-term optionality. But at $245.29 (Jul 2, 2026 close), about $214.6B market cap, and roughly 19x FY2027E EV/Sales, execution tolerance is low. Cautious / medium conviction: real optionality remains, but skew is negative at the current price.
highlights: custom-merchant-silicon 层补位：MRVL 是 Broadcom 之外的 custom ASIC/XPU + optical interconnect + NVLink Fusion 架构校验，对照 hyperscaler 自研 silicon 是否扩散到更多供应商
FY2027 Q1 收入约 $2.42B、毛利 $1.26B、营业利润 $350M、FCF $483M；公开报道当前季度指引约 $2.7B 收入和 $0.93 EPS
管理层公开展望 FY2027/FY2028 收入约 $11.5B/$16.5B；NVIDIA $2B 投资和 NVLink Fusion 合作把 MRVL 从 GPU 替代者变成 NVIDIA 兼容生态供应商
cautious / 中等确信：$245.29、约 19x FY2027E EV/Sales 已要求 FY2027/FY2028 ramp 顺利兑现；战略期权真实，但安全边际不足

stanceRationale.en: At $245.29 and about 19x FY2027E sales, the market already requires the FY2027/FY2028 revenue ramp to land cleanly and keep compounding; our base case recognizes the strategic option but does not clear the implied 34-44% annual growth hurdle with enough margin of safety.

title: Coherent 深度研究报告 - AI 光连接层的全栈光子仪表盘
titleEn: Coherent Deep Research Report - Full-Stack Photonics Dashboard for AI Optical Connectivity
summary: AI 基础设施 optical 层核心光模块/光器件覆盖。Coherent 不是解释 GPU 单价，而是验证 AI 集群网络扩容是否真正穿透到高速光连接、激光器、InP/SiPh 与 CPO/NPO 路线。Q3 FY2026 收入 $1.81B（+21% YoY，pro forma +27%）、非 GAAP 毛利率 39.6%、非 GAAP EPS $1.41；Datacenter & Communications 收入约 $1.362B，占 pro forma 收入约 75%，同比约 +41%。NVIDIA 2026-03 宣布向 Coherent 投资 $2B，并包含多年、数十亿美元采购承诺和未来产能访问权；公司材料给出 1.6T/3.2T/6.4T ZR/ZR+、CPO/NPO、光电路交换与多轨热管理路线。当前 $333.36（2026-07-02 收盘）、市值约 $65.2B、EV 约 $66.8B，估值已经反映 AI optics supercycle。cautious / 低确信：需求证据真实，但现金流和倍数容错率偏紧。
highlights: 补齐 optical 层核心大票：COHR 用高速光连接、激光器、InP/SiPh、CPO/NPO 和光电路交换验证 AI 集群带宽需求是否穿透到光层
Q3 FY2026 收入 $1.81B（+21% YoY；pro forma +27%）、非 GAAP 毛利率 39.6%、非 GAAP EPS $1.41；Datacenter & Communications 约 $1.362B，占 pro forma 收入约 75%，同比约 +41%
NVIDIA 2026-03 宣布向 Coherent 投资 $2B，并包含多年、数十亿美元采购承诺和未来产能访问权；Coherent 路线包含 1.6T/3.2T/6.4T ZR/ZR+ 与 CPO/NPO 引擎
cautious / 低确信：$333.36、约 10.1x EV/TTM sales 已定价 AI optics supercycle；Q3 FCF -$383M 和估值容错率是核心风险
summaryEn: Core optical-module and photonics coverage for the AI-infrastructure optical layer. Coherent does not explain GPU ASPs; it tests whether AI cluster network expansion is reaching high-speed optical connectivity, lasers, InP/SiPh and CPO/NPO architectures. Q3 FY2026 revenue was $1.81B (+21% YoY; +27% pro forma), non-GAAP gross margin was 39.6%, and non-GAAP EPS was $1.41. Datacenter & Communications revenue was about $1.362B, roughly 75% of pro forma revenue and about +41% YoY. In March 2026, NVIDIA announced a $2B investment in Coherent, including a multi-year, multi-billion-dollar purchase commitment and future capacity access rights; Coherent's roadmap includes 1.6T/3.2T/6.4T ZR/ZR+ and CPO/NPO engines. At $333.36 (2026-07-02 close), about $65.2B market cap and about $66.8B EV, the stock already prices an AI-optics supercycle. Cautious / low conviction: demand evidence is real, but cash-flow and multiple tolerance are tight.

upgrade.zh: 若 NVIDIA 相关采购承诺转化为 backlog、收入和产能预付款，Datacenter & Communications 保持增长且不稀释毛利率，InP / 6-inch 产能按计划爬坡，并且 FCF 转正，则上调至 neutral-watch 或 constructive。

downgrade.zh: 若采购承诺转化慢于预期、Datacenter & Communications 增长放缓且毛利率或 FCF 恶化、InP / CPO/NPO 里程碑滑坡，或 AAOI/GLW/ANET 未能确认同一光需求信号，则下调至 bearish-avoid。

title: Digital Realty 深度研究报告 - AI 数据中心租赁与互联需求仪表盘
titleEn: Digital Realty Deep Research Report - Leasing and Interconnection Dashboard for AI Data Centers
summary: AI 基础设施 datacenter-facility 层的租赁/互联需求校验。DLR 不直接解释 GPU、光模块或电力设备，而是验证 AI 数据中心需求是否转化为真实租约、backlog、互联节点和开发容量。Q1 2026 收入 $1.64B（约 +16% YoY）、Core FFO/share $2.04、AFFO/share $1.92；公司签下 $707M 年化 GAAP base rent 的 bookings（100% share），DLR share 为 $423M，其中 0-1MW + interconnection 贡献 $98M、同比 +42%；季度末 signed-but-not-commenced backlog 为 $1.8B（100% share）/ $1.0B（DLR share），加权平均开租滞后 19 个月。当前 $173.30（2026-07-02 收盘）、市值约 $62.0B、EV 约 $77.6B，估值约 21x 2026 Core FFO 指引、约 12.2x EV/TTM revenue。中性观察 / datacenter-facility dashboard。
highlights: 补齐 datacenter-facility 层租赁校验：DLR 把上游 chip/neocloud/buildout 叙事接到真实租约、backlog、cross-connects 和开发容量
Q1 2026 收入 $1.64B、Core FFO/share $2.04、AFFO/share $1.92；2026 Core FFO/share 指引上调至 $8.00-$8.10
Q1 bookings $707M（100% share）/$423M（DLR share），其中 0-1MW + interconnection $98M、同比 +42%；backlog $1.8B（100% share）/$1.0B（DLR share），开租滞后 19 个月
当前 $173.30（2026-07-02）、市值约 $62.0B、EV 约 $77.6B、约 21x 2026 Core FFO 指引；强需求但估值、杠杆、电力/许可和 backlog commence 是核心风险
summaryEn: Leasing and interconnection demand check for the AI-infrastructure data-center facility layer. DLR does not directly explain GPUs, optical modules or power equipment; it tests whether AI data-center demand converts into real leases, backlog, interconnection nodes and development capacity. Q1 2026 revenue was $1.64B (about +16% YoY), Core FFO/share was $2.04 and AFFO/share was $1.92. The company signed $707M of annualized GAAP base-rent bookings at 100% share, or $423M at DLR share, including $98M from the 0-1MW plus interconnection category (+42% YoY). Signed-but-not-commenced backlog was $1.8B at 100% share and $1.0B at DLR share, with a 19-month weighted-average commencement lag. At $173.30 (2026-07-02 close), about $62.0B market cap and about $77.6B EV, DLR trades around 21x 2026 Core FFO guidance and about 12.2x EV/TTM revenue. Neutral watch / data-center facility dashboard.
